title: Daoist Canon: Five Talismans of the Numinous Treasure (Section 6)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Five Talismans of the Numinous Treasure
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Five Talismans of the Numinous Treasure

translation.text: From the Five Talismans of the Numinous Treasure of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
